title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week focused on critical stability improvements for Salesforce integrations. OpsPal now better handles complex Salesforce configurations including State/Country picklists and multi-step deployments, while fixing several connection issues that were preventing HubSpot automations from running properly.

entries.headline: Salesforce automations work better with State/Country picklists
details: OpsPal now automatically detects when your Salesforce org uses State/Country picklists and adjusts field mapping accordingly. Multi-step deployments also run more reliably with improved retry logic.

entries.headline: Multi-step Salesforce deployments run more reliably
